001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
005import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
006
007/**
008 * Repository interface for Google authentication operations.
009 */
010public interface GoogleAuthRepository {
011
012  /**
013   * Attempts a quick sign-in using cached credentials without user interaction.
014   *
015   * @param activity the activity context for the sign-in operation
016   * @return a CompletableFuture containing the Google ID token credential
017   */
018  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signInQuickly(Activity activity);
019
020  /**
021   * Initiates a full sign-in flow requiring user interaction.
022   *
023   * @param activity the activity context for the sign-in operation
024   * @return a CompletableFuture containing the Google ID token credential
025   */
026  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signIn(Activity activity);
027
028  /**
029   * Refreshes an existing Google ID token credential.
030   *
031   * @param activity the activity context for the refresh operation
032   * @param credential the credential to refresh
033   * @return a CompletableFuture containing the refreshed credential
034   */
035  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> refreshToken(
036      Activity activity, GoogleIdTokenCredential credential);
037
038  /**
039   * Signs out the current user.
040   *
041   * @return a CompletableFuture that completes when the sign-out finishes
042   */
043  CompletableFuture<Void> signOut();
044
045  /**
046   * Exception thrown when sign-in is required but not completed.
047   */
048  class SignInRequiredException extends RuntimeException {
049
050    /**
051     * Constructs a SignInRequiredException with the specified message and cause.
052     *
053     * @param message the detail message
054     * @param cause the cause of the exception
055     */
056    public SignInRequiredException(String message, Throwable cause) {
057      super(message, cause);
058    }
059
060  }
061
062}
